title: CEL – E1 Grade Officers – 3 Posts

basic_details.job_title: CEL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Grade Officers Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central Electronics (CEL) has recruits 03 E1 Grade Officers Posts. Candidates With B.Tech/ B.E, CA, CS, ICWAI, MBA Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 30-04-2026, and closes on 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CEL website, celindia.co.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with minimum 55% marks + Professional qualification, Minimum 2 years post-qualification experience

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CEL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
